titles.en: Chapter on Reports Regarding One Who Does Not Make a Bequest at the Time of Death for His Relatives Who Do Not Inherit Anything From His Wealth, Whether Small or Large
Chapter on Reports Regarding One Who Does Not Make a Bequest at the Time of Death for His Relatives Who Do Not Inherit Anything From His Wealth, Whether Small or Large

segments: : "مَنْ لَمْ يُوصِ عِنْدَ مَوْتِهِ لِذَوِي قَرَابَتِهِ فَقَدْ خَتَمَ عَمَلَهُ بِمَعْصِيَةٍ".
arabic.text: : "مَنْ لَمْ يُوصِ عِنْدَ مَوْتِهِ لِذَوِي قَرَابَتِهِ فَقَدْ خَتَمَ عَمَلَهُ بِمَعْصِيَةٍ".

segments:
Hadith.5415 - Abdullah ibn Al-Mughirah narrated from Al-Sakuni from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said:
"Whoever does not make a will for his relatives at the time of his death has concluded his deeds with disobedience."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5415 - Abdullah ibn Al-Mughirah narrated from Al-Sakuni from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said:
"Whoever does not make a will for his relatives at the time of his death has concluded his deeds with disobedience."

narratorChain.raw: 5415 - رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ اَلْمُغِيرَةِ عَنِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ
